title: Full Stack Data Flow: The Request-Response Cycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the complete path of a data request (Read operation) as it travels through the different layers of a full stack application, from the user interface to the database and back.
relationships: User initiates a request from the Client Browser
Frontend sends an API call (e.g., GET) to the Backend Server
Server-Side Logic processes the request and queries the Database
Database returns the requested data to the Server
Server formats and sends the data as a response to the Frontend
Frontend renders the data for the User
